title: Pasta Mod
description: Adds pasta armor, tools and, of course, lots of food!
body:
# Pasta Core Ore
Have you ever wondered how pasta is made? In this mod the answer is simple: Pasta Ore, which is found in caves, is combined with wheat. This ore is quite rare and hard to break (unless you have a diamond pickaxe), but it can be used to create some cool things, such as…
## Penne and Spaghetti
These two types of pasta, of course, might be eaten, but it’s not the best way to use them. Instead, use them as materials to craft some incredible tools and armor (or just better food).

![Spaghetti craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ffafcfb0757ed9efda6f0e422f079e3a603abab.png)
 ![Penne craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a07309cd6f581d2831d210f39c4376f8ca53e8af.png)
 
## Pasta Pickaxe
One side of it is shorter than another, so why don’t you use it as a hoe? Of course, it is still a nice pickaxe (diamond level) and can be eaten!

![Pasta pickaxe craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f27ab5a9bd2468330064fedf200fe8f09e057ef8.png)

## Spaghetti Sword
Just a nice sword wich can be eaten.

![Spaghetti sword craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b54f36d3067c72d2cd0ce62eec3d503124b5b2b.png)
 
## Beef with Spaghetti
Unfortunately, Steve has just a crafting table, so he just wrapped spaghetti around the steak. It is really delicious and nourishing, though.

![Beef with Spaghetti craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/933a26a91af23a70f88601d51532b7a2632499fe.png)
 
## Beef with Spaghetti Sword
A very good sword! Deals nice damage and has a chance (50%) to set enemies on fire and slow them down. Also, gives you saturation for five seconds by right clicking.

![Beef with Spaghetti Sword craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58231fb5576e9a737e9e71e06e8b04e707a05ab4.png)
 
## Penne Dagger
Has small damage and high attack speed, as a normal dagger. Applies Night Vision (because, you know, carrots are good for eyes) and Speed II for 5 seconds by right click. However, it consumes a lot of durability. But this weapon works way better, if you wear a full set of Pasta Armor. In that case you will get Night Vision and Speed III for 20 seconds with no durability consumption.

![Penne Dagger craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8e6be63cf5f5e4232da16a267ddb1ab43468f59.png)
 
# Tomatoes
The most famous way to eat spaghetti is to add some tomatoes to it. Unfortunately, we don’t have tomatoes in vanilla minecraft, so this mod fixes it by adding tomato zombies. They spawn during the night on the overworld surface. It’s not easy to kill them, as they are a bit stronger than regular zombies. After death these strange creations drop some seeds, which you can plant to grow your own tomatoes to use as a craft material.

![Zombie and armor set](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/469617f815438ccc6b2bb948e94ddd5f17a6c4b4.png)
![Tomato Spaghetti craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc0547e6876377fb79b921c178ffd19f95fcbb36.png)

 
## Spaghetti Armor
A great set with high defense value that unlocks Penne Dager potential.

![Helmet carft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4e5b0cd525a5740365d498f7f701c7a3d32be41.png)
![Chestplate craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2665c6ae56165ffd518fa6be404d61cdf8d6e1a.png)
![Leggings craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae33fa5e9898d46322061c4d8026f29281db6ffa.png)
![Boots craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12681e78ee3b4ae8a8e1eb1b662ab0579f7c77e5.png)
